industry: D2C bags and accessories (backpacks, sling bags, laptop bags, wallets, travel gear)
product_description: Indian D2C bags brand making anti-theft + waterproof backpacks, sling bags, laptop bags, tote bags, and accessories in vegan leather. Known for design-forward aesthetics, pastel + bold colorways, and practical features like rain covers, USB charging ports, and RFID-safe compartments. Price range ₹999–₹4,999. Sold via D2C website, Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra, and growing offline pop-ups. Target: college students, young professionals, travelers.
target_audience: Urban and semi-urban Indians aged 18-32. College students, young working professionals, creators, and travelers. They value design, utility, and social-media-worthy aesthetics. Compare on looks, feature-per-rupee, and brand voice. Gen Z + younger millennials who follow fashion/travel creators on Instagram and YouTube. Willing to pay ₹1,500-₹3,500 for a bag that feels premium without the Fjallraven / Herschel price tag.
unique_selling_points: Design-forward aesthetics — pastel + bold colorways competitors don't do
Practical features built in (rain cover, USB port, RFID safe, anti-theft back pocket)
Premium-looking bags at a fraction of Fjallraven / Herschel price
focus_product: The newest Arctic Fox flagship backpack / sling released in 2026 — identify the exact SKU via web_search ('Arctic Fox new backpack 2026', 'Arctic Fox latest launch 2026'), Instagram, and thearcticfox.com new-arrivals. Build the campaign around THIS specific SKU. If nothing from 2026 is verifiable, fall back to the newest identifiable hero SKU and state the assumption.
